---
title: "CV"
---

## Experience

### Research Assistant - Inria Saclay (OPIS)
March 2026 - August 2026

Lipschitz certificates of deep unrolling methods for solving linear inverse problems, under the supervision of Emilie Chouzenoux and Jean-Christophe Pesquet.

### Research Visitor - POSTECH CVLab
January 2025 - July 2025

Reinforcement learning applied to the grammatical analysis of human actions in videos, under the supervision of Minsu Cho.

### Research Intern - Dassault Systemes
June 2024 - December 2024

Optimized performance of the Microsoft Z3 SMT solver for system verification and property checking, including DPLL algorithm fine-tuning, multi-threading in C++, and machine learning with XGBoost for strategy selection.

## Education

### M.Sc. in Data Science - Ecole Polytechnique
September 2025 - April 2026
GPA : 4.0/4.0
**Relevant courses:** Statistical Learning, Advanced Deep Learning, Operator Learning, Generative Models, Hidden Markov Models, Optimal Transport, Graphical Models, Stochastic Approximation, Time Series, Algorithmic Optimization.

### M.Sc. in Applied Mathematics (Auditor) - MVA, ENS Paris-Saclay
September 2025 - April 2026

**Relevant courses:** Medical Image Analysis, Applied Mathematics for Neuroscience, Distributed and Large Scale Computing Optimization.

### Diplome d'ingenieur (M.Eng.) in Mathematics and Computer Science - Ecole Nationale des Ponts et Chaussees
2022 - April 2026

**Relevant courses:** Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Statistics, Stochastic Processes, Differential Equations, Financial Mathematics.

### CPGE - La Martiniere Monplaisir
2020 - 2022

Intensive preparation for French engineering school entrance exams, with coursework in theoretical mathematics and physics, plus French literature and foreign languages.
